title: Add chest/deposit-withdraw interaction capability
description:
## Problem
The agent has no ability to interact with containers (chests, barrels, etc.) in the world. It cannot deposit items, withdraw items, or manage inventory across storage.

## Agent Request
From session log: "deposit/withdraw" and "trade" commands were suggested by the agent as useful chat harness utilities.

## Scope
- Define a `DepositItem` / `WithdrawItem` action protocol for the Mineflayer adapter
- Add chest interaction handling in `index.js` (open chest, deposit items, withdraw items)
- Add C# tool (`DepositItemTool`, `WithdrawItemTool`) in `Agent.Tools`
- Wire into chat interpreter via LLM (not deterministic regex)
- Handle edge cases: chest not found, chest already open, inventory full

## Future expansion
- Trade with villagers would build on this container interaction foundation
- Automated material storage during build projects

## Complexity
Medium. Requires Mineflayer adapter changes + C# tooling + testing.

## Priority
Low — nice to have after core gathering/building/crafting flows are solid.
